title: Wildfire Rising
description: A mod adding fully custom weapons including 3D models, special skills and custom effects.
body:
A mod that adds multiple new weapons to the game, each with a completely new gameplay. Currently in the game:

# Crimson Moon's Semblance
## Spear X Scythe

Spear: Applies Blood Debt I on hit (Damage over Time, -10% attack speed), right click: switch into scythe (CD starts on 5 seconds, increased in 1:1 ratio until 45s). Dealing damage with the weapon in spear form decreases the form swap cooldown for 0.8 seconds (must be a valid hit (thus no Weak attacks))

Scythe: Applies Blood Debt II on hit (Damage over Time, -10% attack speed, increases damage taken from this weapon by 10%)
Every hit dealt applies Bond of Life worth 0.5 hearts (prevents healing for the Bonded amount)

Skill: Deals damage worth 75% of the total BoL of the wielder to all marked by Blood Debt II, and removes all marks. Removes all BoL from wielder and heals for 100% of Bonded amount
Each Heart marked by Bond of Life increases the wielder's damage output by this weapon and damage resistance by 5%
This weapon also causes you to lose hunger 50% slower than usual, as well rendering the wielder resistant to any form of saturation healing during the scythe form
